{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

    "R1.2": "The output identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix.",

    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (self-referential convergence argument).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."

rationale.R1.2: The output identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix.
rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (self-referential convergence argument).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
